artifact: AP-E10 compactness, finite-R homogenization, and translation quotient

checks.name: the exact three-periodic sphere-valued sequence disproves weak continuity of the one-corner forward Skyrme minors
the exact two-periodic sequence gives a nonzero diffuse forward-current defect at degree zero
the fixed-boundary localization remains energy-bounded and approaches a nonzero diffuse current defect
the Skyrme-minor bound enforces the pointwise L4/3 current estimate and excludes singular concentration
all six- and five-tet bond directions are cycle-balanced, proving zero corrector by Jensen
random-start corrector solves reproduce the exact closed cell formulas
six- and five-tet homogenized quartics are nonproportional
the canonical AP-E6 seed checksum remains frozen
all quotient representatives are unanchored stationary admissible B=1 fields
the smaller-a/larger-L and translation/triangulation thresholds are evaluated without promoting failed mathematics

compactness_counterexample.exact_minor_identity: for theta=2 pi (x+2y)/3 and (n1,n2)=eta a(cos theta,sin theta), M_12^(1,2)=(3 sqrt(3)/2) eta^2 although the continuum-limit minor is zero
compactness_counterexample.localized_limit: J_forward converges weakly to -16 eta^3 chi^3 dx
compactness_counterexample.sequence: u=( (-1)^(x+y), (-1)^(y+z), (-1)^(z+x) ); n_a=(sqrt(1-3 eta^2 a^2), eta a u) on the torus, localized by chi=prod_i sin^2(pi x_i) for the fixed-vacuum cube
compactness_counterexample.verdict: singular concentration is excluded by the L^(4/3) bound, but compensated compactness fails through a nonzero diffuse oscillatory defect

finite_R_cell_problem.cell_formula: Q_hom(A)=|Y|^(-1) inf_phi sum_(p,r in B_Y) |A r + phi(p+r)-phi(p)|^4
finite_R_cell_problem.proof_certificate: for every bond direction the periodic directed graph is cycle-balanced; the mean corrector increment is zero and convex Jensen gives phi=0 exactly
finite_R_cell_problem.verdict: the finite-R barrier density is computed, but triangulation dependence survives homogenization and therefore blocks regulator universality

local_gradient_concentration.site_measure: sum over three tangent components plus breathing-gradient squared

final_topology.method: orientation-aware normalized-affine degree on the same tetrahedral complex used by the barrier

gate.centering_interpretation: translation quotient is the primary gate; barycentre residual is a Peierls-locking diagnostic because re-relaxation may return a shifted field to a mesh-preferred representative
